key.name: message-drafts
key.description: Message drafts stored by workspace, conversation, and optional thread.

key.name: sidebar-show-unreads-section
key.description: Whether unread conversations are duplicated into a separate Unreads section at the top of the conversation sidebar.

key.name: notifications-enabled-v1
key.description: Whether Conduit may send desktop notifications for relevant incoming messages.

key.name: notifications-direct-messages-v1
key.description: Whether incoming direct and group direct messages are relevant for desktop notifications.

key.name: notifications-mentions-and-names-v1
key.summary: Notify for mentions and configured names
key.description: Whether direct Slack mentions and configured names or aliases are relevant for desktop notifications.

key.name: notifications-thread-replies-v1
key.description: Whether replies in threads the user started, participated in, or subscribed to are relevant for desktop notifications.

key.name: notifications-names-and-aliases-v1
key.summary: Names and aliases used for notification matching
key.description: Names and aliases that make an incoming message relevant when mention and name notifications are enabled.

key.name: notifications-keywords-v1
key.summary: Keywords and phrases used for notification matching
key.description: Keywords and phrases that make an incoming message relevant for desktop notifications.

key.name: recent-reactions
key.description: The three most recently used emoji reaction names shown in message quick actions.

key.name: window-width
key.description: The last non-maximized width of the main window.

key.name: window-height
key.description: The last non-maximized height of the main window.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window was maximized when Conduit last closed.
